feed.title: Journal of English as a Lingua Franca
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Journal of English as a Lingua Franca (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Translanguaging with AI-powered tools and English for specific academic purposes: Chinese international students’ experiences in Anglophone English medium instruction higher education
entry.summary: Authors: Pimsiri Taylor, Andrew Gunn DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jelf-2025-0025 Pages: Page range: 1-26

entry.title: Exploring the impact of technology-enhanced intercultural exchanges on EFL learners’ speaking performance and awareness of English as a Lingua Franca
entry.summary: Authors: Ayşe Girgin Çatan, Mustafa Naci Kayaoğlu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jelf-2025-0020 Pages: Page range: 27-52

entry.title: From idealized nativeness to selfhood by embracing non nativeness: exploring English major university students perceptions about English in Pakistan
entry.summary: Authors: Sham Haidar DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jelf-2025-0003 Pages: Page range: 53-76

entry.title: From native speaker ideal to accommodative mindset: changes in non-native English majors’ perceptions and priorities in learning English
entry.summary: Authors: Marilize Pretorius, Kris Van de Poel DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jelf-2024-0001 Pages: Page range: 77-101

entry.title: Marking L2 written exam answers in an EMI context: no effect of ELF and no foreign language effect on grading by university lecturers
entry.summary: Authors: Lidy Zijlmans, Roeland van Hout, Marc van Oostendorp DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jelf-2024-0002 Pages: Page range: 103-127

entry.title: English language teachers’ reactions to ELF-like grammatical usages in Chinese university students’ writing
entry.summary: Authors: Joel Heng Hartse DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jelf-2025-0004 Pages: Page range: 129-152

entry.title: English as a Lingua Franca: sense of awareness and perceived implications in an English teacher education program at a public university in Colombia
entry.summary: Authors: Diego Fernando Macías Villegas, Jhon Eduardo Mosquera Pérez DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jelf-2025-0006 Pages: Page range: 153-176

entry.title: Global Englishes in action: fostering self-efficacy and embracing diversity in pre-service English teacher education
entry.summary: Authors: Nur Gedik Bal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jelf-2025-0019 Pages: Page range: 177-205

entry.title: Dismantling the Native Speaker Construct in English Language Teaching
entry.summary: Authors: Aida Rico Pérez DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jelf-2026-0002 Pages: Page range: 207-212
